nasb.text: Moses was angry with the officers of the army, the captains of thousands and the captains of hundreds, who had come from service in the war.

esv.text: And Moses was angry with the officers of the army, the commanders of thousands and the commanders of hundreds, who had come from service in the war.

cnv.text: 摩西對作戰回來的軍官，就是對千夫長和百夫長發怒。

ccb.text: 摩西对回来的千夫长和百夫长发怒，
